programmes.show_description: An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Whodunnit with Lori Loughlin and Sarah Strange. After her neighbourhood is hit by a wave of break-ins, a nifty garage sale buyer turned amateur sleuth gets to work. (2013)
Thriller starring Karen Cliché. After meeting her birth mother at her father's funeral, a woman begins to suspect her newfound relative has sinister motives (2017).

programmes.show_name: Secrets of a Gold Digger Killer
programmes.show_description: Gripping thriller based on true events, starring Julie Benz. A femme fatale with a taste for riches pulls the strings on a deadly plot to have her multi-millionaire husband murdered. (2021)

Stan by Me: Mary Shannon is a Deputy U.S. Marshal for the Federal Witness Security Program - the department responsible for the relocation and protection of state witnesses.
Dead From New York: When the powerful creator of a long-running comedy sketch show is murdered, Castle and Beckett investigate and uncover a shocking secret.
...Death: Murder mystery with Alison Sweeney. A true-crime podcaster investigates a death at a self-help retreat. Can she piece together the clues, or will the killer mute her investigation? (2021)

Slam Dunk Dead: Jesse is accused of malpractice when a professional basketball star seemingly dies from the medication prescribed to him. Can Dr Sloan help to prove his friend's innocence?
Looks Can Kill: Dr Sloan investigates when a healthy, young woman dies in suspicious circumstances. Is her death linked to a plastic surgery clinic?
Frozen Stiff: Jessica investigates the murder of a company accountant. Can she find a murderer and $750,000 stolen from the business's literacy foundation?
Unwilling Witness: Jessica is surprised when she is summoned to testify before a federal grand jury. Can she find a murderer after she is charged with contempt of court?
The Fugitive: The team are tasked with capturing an escaped convict before he kills his ex-wife. Meanwhile, painful memories are rekindled when Sue attends a high school classmate's wedding.
Hollander's Woods: Whilst investigating a death in the woods, Castle is confronted with a defining event from his childhood that's haunted him for decades.
Blind Alleys: A father seeking justice for his son takes members of the Queens police department hostage.

...Malice: No one digs a mystery like archaeologist Emma Fielding - so when a colleague is murdered in a crypt, she soon unearths a long list of suspects... (2018)

Fatal Impact: Part 1: Amanda and Dr Sloan help the F.B.I investigate a tragic, fatal plane crash near Community General. Jesse discovers that two passengers are unaccounted for. Part 1 of 2.
Fatal Impact: Part 2: The complex investigation into the tragic plane crash continues. Will Dr Sloan's recollection of an incident from 20-years-ago help to solve the case? Part 2 of 2.
Kendo Killing: Jessica travels to Japan to conduct a series of lectures at a local university. Can she solve the murder of a motorcycle racer?
Death Goes Double Platinum: Jessica becomes embroiled in the music industry when she attempts to help an up-and-coming band. But will a New York mobster get his own way?
Billy The Kid: Jack investigates the shooting of a respected judge after his protégé is charged with the crime; Lucy fears her mother's new fiancé isn't who he claims to be.
Xy: There are different sides to every story in this two-parter. The explosive chain of events that follow a phone call is first told from Castle's perspective in this season premiere.
The Comeback: Carrie believes she may have discovered the identity of the anonymous caller who was behind a series of sniper attacks in the city.
Gilted Lily: Mary Shannon is a Deputy U.S. Marshal for the Federal Witness Security Program - the department responsible for the relocation and protection of state witnesses.
